name_en: Large Lunch Box Bag~Trending Shoulder Bag Cubi Embroidery Design. The design exudes a premium feel; pairing it with a simple white T-shirt creates a wonderful chemistry. The adjustable strap is well-thought-out without excessive fuss. Simply click to secure and free your hands. It looks good as a handbag, underarm, or shoulder bag. Large capacity and lightweight. Get ready to turn heads! size: 25-21-16.5
